notes.text: We now provide the preferredAction startup parameter to automatically trigger the SmartSummary action on the object page
When using key user adaptation on the object page, the Configure Table dialog now only displays create mode options specific for each table variant
We now show an illustrated message if there is no data in a chart
We've resolved an issue where an invalid application state during navigation caused errors when interacting with SAP Fiori launchpad
We've resolved an issue where column personalization settings were applied to incorrect columns in a draft-enabled grid table due to the Edit Status column not being calculated into the column index
